lessons.statement: Scene density of a visual change every 2–3.5s in the open reduces early drop-off.

evidence.note: Bootstrap — raise confidence when corroborated by reviews

lessons.statement: Thumbnails with one large subject + short numeric claim beat multi-element clutter.

lessons.statement: Captions that punch the hook keywords in the first 3s outperform dense paragraph captions.

lessons.statement: Curiosity gaps that confront a wrong belief outperform definition openings.
